name: Blueberry Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease or spray an 8x8-inch baking pan.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
3. In a bowl, mix together flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Stir in blueberries.
5. In a small bowl, beat the egg and combine with milk and oil until mixed.
6. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry mixture and stir just until all dry ingredients are evenly moistened.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
8. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
